svg.text: System architecture — a world that builds itself for autonomous AI teams.
MCP · every tool + the self-extension surface
Gemini · the brain of every agent
YOU — inside an ordinary (vanilla) Minecraft world
THE WORLD — Java 21 · the only code that touches Minecraft
live parametric builds — block-by-block · villager spawn + pathing
HQ island · cinema screens · tap-to-approve UI
THE ORCHESTRATOR — Node / TypeScript runtime · single event loop
THE ORGANISATION — ADK service · Python · adk api_server
extends the org via the World API (MCP)
tools = McpToolset(StreamableHTTP) → omo-tools · one reusable specialist app makes the org extensible to ANY function
THE OUTSIDE WORLD — every tool over MCP · Gemini is the brain
You state intent — the org declares the function it needs and the world materialises it. No human pre-wires a thing:
world_describe → world_add_function → world_build → world_staff → world_assign ( + world_consult: agents ask each other )
Generated from the codebase · solid = built today · dashed = roadmap · omo-mc
Gemini reasons · ADK orchestrates · MCP connects — including the org's own growth.
